chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-280 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For Hearing of CMA 1187/24 3.For hearing of main case. 30-05-2024 Mr. Gul Sher Ali, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Vinod Kumar, Advocate along with respondent No.5. M/s Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G and Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G. ***** In terms of last order, petitioner No.1 was medically examined by the Board and she has been declared aged between 17 to 18 years. ASI/I.O Zaheer Ahmed of P.S, Sobhodero is present and submits that he has already recorded statement of petitioner No.1 who has reiterated her freewill marriage with petitioner No.2 and therefore he will file a report before concerned Magistrate disposing of the case under C-class. The Magistrate is directed to pass an appropriate order on such report within 15-days and dispose of the case, as recommended. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application(s) is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
